meta.sourcesNote: Facelift flags for select models cross-checked with Indian automotive media (e.g. HT Auto, Autocar India, IndiaCarNews) for early-2026 launches. All other isFacelift values default to false unless listed in nested-catalog-facelift-overrides.json — extend that file and re-run this script.
meta.disclaimer: Indicative specifications and ex-showroom prices for comparison and app use only. Always confirm variant, price, and equipment with the manufacturer or authorised dealer before purchase.
